utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 item keys. Now check full specification details: 1) destination: provided (Lisbon, Portugal) — fully specified. 2) travel_dates: provided (July 10-14, 2024) — specific dates — fully specified. 3) transportation: requires flight details with costs. Final has type 'Budget Airlines Economy Class' and a cost range '€240-€600 for 4 people' but no specific flight details (airlines, flight numbers, times, or routes). Thus not fully specified. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs — name, details, and cost provided — fully specified. 5) activities: selected activities with costs. Given the format asks for 'complete cost breakdown,' the presence of only totals without summing line items (and given transportation and activities costs are missing) means this is not fully specified. Therefore fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, additional_services = 4 out of 7.
